purpose: Blocklist of Chinese political institutions to exclude from pa search results (user-specific filter, not general academic filter)
warning: PERSONAL SENSITIVITY FILTER. Other users may want to include these. Logged to stderr for transparency.
merge_criterion: When user adds a new institution during research, it takes effect immediately. No bulk-merge needed.

categories.political-research-institute: International relations / 马克思主义 research institutes under CASS
categories.central-party-school: 中央党校 / 省委党校 / 市委党校
categories.official-think-tank: Official think tanks (e.g. 国务院发展研究中心, 中国社会科学院)

user_added_examples: User can add: '中国社会科学院世界经济与政治研究所'
User can add: '中共中央党校'
User can add: '清华大学马克思主义学院'
